inputEvidence.determination: METADATA COVERAGE PARTIAL — EXTRACTION PROTOTYPE ALLOWED WITH REVIEW BUCKETS
EXTRACTION PROTOTYPE PARTIAL — VALIDATION ALLOWED WITH REVIEW BUCKETS
EXTRACTION VALIDATION PARTIAL — CONFIDENCE VALIDATION ALLOWED WITH REVIEW BUCKETS
CONFIDENCE VALIDATION RECOVERY PARTIAL — REASSESSMENT ALLOWED WITH REVIEW BUCKETS
DIRECTIONAL EVIDENCE CHAIN COMPLETE WITH REVIEW BUCKETS — GOVERNANCE REVIEW ALLOWED
GOVERNANCE REVIEW COMPLETE WITH REVIEW BUCKETS — GOVERNANCE PACKAGE ALLOWED
GOVERNANCE PACKAGE COMPLETE WITH REVIEW BUCKETS — V691 ASSESSMENT ALLOWED
RUNTIME READINESS ASSESSMENT COMPLETE WITH CONDITIONS — FUTURE EVALUATION ALLOWED

runtimeProtectionPhilosophy.mission: Gridly remains Know Before You Go with Awareness Platform First and Route Intelligence Second.
runtimeProtectionPhilosophy.principle: Safety takes precedence over directional capability.
runtimeProtectionPhilosophy.authorization: V692 creates protections only; it does not authorize runtime integration, display, or implementation.

reversible_lane.runtimeAccess: prohibited until manually resolved and separately authorized

construction_segment.runtimeAccess: prohibited until manually resolved and separately authorized

hov_hot_lane.runtimeAccess: prohibited until manually resolved and separately authorized

missing_county.runtimeAccess: prohibited until manually resolved and separately authorized

missing_oneway.runtimeAccess: prohibited until manually resolved and separately authorized

missing_ref.runtimeAccess: prohibited until manually resolved and separately authorized

manual_review_required.runtimeAccess: prohibited until manually resolved and separately authorized

expectations: require rollback availability before future runtime consideration

runtimeAuthorizationFramework.rule: Passing previous stages does not automatically authorize the next stage.

runtimeGateProtectionMatrix.name: Evidence Chain
runtimeGateProtectionMatrix.failureImpact: Evidence chain cannot support future review.
runtimeGateProtectionMatrix.requiredResponse: Stop authorization progression and regenerate/repair evidence.

runtimeGateProtectionMatrix.name: Governance
runtimeGateProtectionMatrix.failureImpact: Governance package cannot constrain runtime risk.
runtimeGateProtectionMatrix.requiredResponse: Return to governance review before runtime consideration.

runtimeGateProtectionMatrix.name: Review Buckets
runtimeGateProtectionMatrix.failureImpact: Review-required records could leak into confidence/runtime.
runtimeGateProtectionMatrix.requiredResponse: Hard-isolate, prohibit promotion/display, and downgrade unresolved records.
blockConditions: unresolved review bucket used at runtime

runtimeGateProtectionMatrix.name: Bearing
runtimeGateProtectionMatrix.failureImpact: Geometry could be misused as confidence or display truth.
runtimeGateProtectionMatrix.requiredResponse: Reject bearing-only dependency and downgrade affected candidates.

runtimeGateProtectionMatrix.name: Containment
runtimeGateProtectionMatrix.failureImpact: Directional evidence could escape county, corridor, source, or evidence limits.
runtimeGateProtectionMatrix.requiredResponse: Downgrade readiness and block runtime consideration.

runtimeGateProtectionMatrix.name: Display
runtimeGateProtectionMatrix.failureImpact: NB/SB/EB/WB labels could imply unsupported certainty.
runtimeGateProtectionMatrix.requiredResponse: Keep display prohibited pending separate display review.

runtimeGateProtectionMatrix.name: Authorization
runtimeGateProtectionMatrix.failureImpact: Prior assessment could be mistaken for activation approval.
runtimeGateProtectionMatrix.requiredResponse: Require explicit future authorization before any implementation.

nextPhaseRecommendation: V693 — Directional Authorization Review (assessment only; not runtime integration, display, or activation)
finalDetermination: RUNTIME PROTECTION FRAMEWORK COMPLETE WITH CONDITIONS — FUTURE AUTHORIZATION REVIEW ALLOWED
